yearEnd.title: Year-End Closure
yearEnd.subtitle: Close fiscal years and manage year-end processes

noYears.title: No Years Available
noYears.description: There are no years available to close at this time.

availableYears.title: {{count}} Year(s) Available to Close
availableYears.description: These years have transactions and can be closed. Years must be closed sequentially starting from the oldest.

closedYears.title: Closed Years
closedYears.noYears: No years have been closed yet

wizard.title: Close Fiscal Year
wizard.selectYearPrompt: Select the fiscal year you want to close:
wizard.sequentialDescription: Years must be closed in order, starting from the oldest year with transactions.
wizard.reviewBeforeClosing: Please review the information below before proceeding.
wizard.notesPlaceholder: Optional notes about this year-end closure...

reopen.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to reopen year {{year}}? This will delete the year-end closure and opening balance transactions. This action cannot be undone.
reopen.warning: This will delete the year-end closure and opening balance transactions.
reopen.blockedByNextYear: Cannot reopen year {{year}} because year {{nextYear}} is still closed. Please reopen year {{nextYear}} first.
